prompt: Create an ultra-realistic cinematic street-fashion portrait of a stylish young Korean woman standing on a narrow city sidewalk outside a luxury European-style café. Shoot from an extreme high angle above her, as if the camera is leaning over her from the street side, using a wide-angle lens that makes the perspective dramatic and immersive. She looks directly up into the camera with a soft, calm, slightly curious expression, one hand gently lifting the brim of her khaki beige baseball cap and the other hand tucked casually into her cargo pants pocket. She has short tousled black bob hair with airy bangs, natural dewy makeup, clear skin, glossy eyes, and relaxed lips. Her outfit includes exactly 6 visible fashion items: a faded oversized black vintage graphic T-shirt with a worn Nirvana-style angel/wing print, loose olive green cargo pants, black-and-white low-top sneakers, a black backpack over one shoulder, a thin gold necklace with a tiny pendant, and the baseball cap. Place her beside exactly 3 café objects: a round white marble bistro table with gray veining, a single tan woven rattan café chair with curved wooden frame, and a small takeaway coffee cup with a black lid on the table. The background is the dark green façade of an elegant café with tall glass windows reflecting warm interior lights, shelves, framed décor, and soft golden bokeh; the street pavement is dark stone tile with subtle texture. Use natural late-afternoon ambient light, realistic skin tones, shallow depth of field, crisp detail on the subject, soft background blur, cinematic color grading, 35mm editorial street photography feel, vertical 2:3 composition, no text overlays, no watermark, no extra people.
promptEn: Create an ultra-realistic cinematic street-fashion portrait of a stylish young Korean woman standing on a narrow city sidewalk outside a luxury European-style café. Shoot from an extreme high angle above her, as if the camera is leaning over her from the street side, using a wide-angle lens that makes the perspective dramatic and immersive. She looks directly up into the camera with a soft, calm, slightly curious expression, one hand gently lifting the brim of her khaki beige baseball cap and the other hand tucked casually into her cargo pants pocket. She has short tousled black bob hair with airy bangs, natural dewy makeup, clear skin, glossy eyes, and relaxed lips. Her outfit includes exactly 6 visible fashion items: a faded oversized black vintage graphic T-shirt with a worn Nirvana-style angel/wing print, loose olive green cargo pants, black-and-white low-top sneakers, a black backpack over one shoulder, a thin gold necklace with a tiny pendant, and the baseball cap. Place her beside exactly 3 café objects: a round white marble bistro table with gray veining, a single tan woven rattan café chair with curved wooden frame, and a small takeaway coffee cup with a black lid on the table. The background is the dark green façade of an elegant café with tall glass windows reflecting warm interior lights, shelves, framed décor, and soft golden bokeh; the street pavement is dark stone tile with subtle texture. Use natural late-afternoon ambient light, realistic skin tones, shallow depth of field, crisp detail on the subject, soft background blur, cinematic color grading, 35mm editorial street photography feel, vertical 2:3 composition, no text overlays, no watermark, no extra people.
promptZh: 创作一张超写实的电影感街头时尚人像，主角是一位时尚的年轻 韩裔 女性，站在欧式豪华咖啡馆外的狭窄城市人行道上。采用从她上方极高机位的俯拍视角，仿佛相机从街边探出，使用广角镜头营造出戏剧性且沉浸式的透视效果。她抬头直视镜头，表情柔和、平静且略带好奇，一只手轻轻抬起 卡其米色 棒球帽的帽檐，另一只手随意插在工装裤口袋里。她留着凌乱的黑色波波头，带有空气刘海，妆容自然水润，皮肤通透，眼神明亮，双唇放松。她的穿搭包含 6 件清晰可见的时尚单品：一件褪色的超大廓形黑色复古印花 T 恤（带有磨损感的 Nirvana 风格天使/翅膀图案）、宽松的橄榄绿工装裤、黑白配色低帮运动鞋、单肩背着的黑色双肩包、一条带有小吊坠的细金项链，以及那顶棒球帽。在她身边放置 3 件咖啡馆物品：一张带有灰色纹理的圆形白色大理石小酒馆桌、一把带有弧形木框架的棕褐色编织藤椅，以及桌上一杯带黑色盖子的外带咖啡。背景是优雅咖啡馆的深绿色外立面，高大的玻璃窗反射出温暖的室内灯光、货架、装饰画框和柔和的金色光斑；街道地面为带有细腻纹理的深色石砖。使用自然午后环境光，肤色真实，浅景深，主体细节清晰，背景虚化柔和，电影级调色，35mm 编辑类街头摄影质感，2:3 竖构图，无文字覆盖，无水印，画面中无其他路人。
